# Tests --output-htmx-helpers (a deprecated alias of --use-htmx) generates the
# HTMX response-header setters and request-header readers on the template data.
#
# Coverage is behavioral, not structural:
#   - muxt check statically typechecks every .HX* call in the templates against
#     the generated methods, so it fails if any helper is missing or has the
#     wrong signature (this replaces grepping for `func ... HXFoo`).
#   - the Go test drives each helper at runtime and asserts the response headers
#     it sets and the request headers it reads.

muxt generate --output-htmx-helpers
muxt check

exec go test -count=1

-- go.mod --
module example.com

go 1.25
-- in.go --
package main

func main() {}
-- template.go --
package main

import (
	"embed"
	"html/template"
)

//go:embed template.gohtml
var templatesDir embed.FS

var templates = template.Must(template.ParseFS(templatesDir, "template.gohtml"))
-- template.gohtml --
{{define "GET / 200"}}
{{if .HXRequest}}
  <div id="content">HTMX fragment</div>
{{else}}
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html><body>
  <div id="content">Full page</div>
</body></html>
{{end}}
{{end}}

{{define "POST /set 200"}}{{.HXLocation "/loc"}}{{.HXPushURL "/push"}}{{.HXRedirect "/redir"}}{{.HXRefresh}}{{.HXReplaceURL "/replace"}}{{.HXReswap "outerHTML"}}{{.HXRetarget "#target"}}{{.HXReselect "#select"}}{{.HXTrigger "evt"}}{{.HXTriggerAfterSettle "settle"}}{{.HXTriggerAfterSwap "swap"}}set{{end}}

{{define "GET /read 200"}}boosted={{.HXBoosted}};current={{.HXCurrentURL}};restore={{.HXHistoryRestoreRequest}};prompt={{.HXPrompt}};request={{.HXRequest}};target={{.HXTargetElementID}};trigname={{.HXTriggerName}};trigid={{.HXTriggerElementID}}{{end}}
-- template_test.go --
package main

import (
	"net/http"
	"net/http/httptest"
	"strings"
	"testing"
)

func TestFullPage(t *testing.T) {
	mux := http.NewServeMux()
	TemplateRoutes(mux, nil)

	rec := httptest.NewRecorder()
	mux.ServeHTTP(rec, httptest.NewRequest(http.MethodGet, "/", nil))

	if rec.Code != http.StatusOK {
		t.Fatalf("status = %d, want %d", rec.Code, http.StatusOK)
	}
	if body := rec.Body.String(); !strings.Contains(body, "Full page") {
		t.Errorf("body = %q, want it to contain %q", body, "Full page")
	}
}

func TestHTMXFragment(t *testing.T) {
	mux := http.NewServeMux()
	TemplateRoutes(mux, nil)

	req := httptest.NewRequest(http.MethodGet, "/", nil)
	req.Header.Set("HX-Request", "true")
	rec := httptest.NewRecorder()
	mux.ServeHTTP(rec, req)

	if rec.Code != http.StatusOK {
		t.Fatalf("status = %d, want %d", rec.Code, http.StatusOK)
	}
	if body := rec.Body.String(); !strings.Contains(body, "HTMX fragment") {
		t.Errorf("body = %q, want it to contain %q", body, "HTMX fragment")
	}
}

// TestResponseSetters drives every HX* response-header setter and asserts the
// header each one writes.
func TestResponseSetters(t *testing.T) {
	mux := http.NewServeMux()
	TemplateRoutes(mux, nil)

	rec := httptest.NewRecorder()
	mux.ServeHTTP(rec, httptest.NewRequest(http.MethodPost, "/set", nil))

	if rec.Code != http.StatusOK {
		t.Fatalf("status = %d, want %d", rec.Code, http.StatusOK)
	}
	for header, want := range map[string]string{
		"HX-Location":             "/loc",
		"HX-Push-Url":             "/push",
		"HX-Redirect":             "/redir",
		"HX-Refresh":              "true",
		"HX-Replace-Url":          "/replace",
		"HX-Reswap":               "outerHTML",
		"HX-Retarget":             "#target",
		"HX-Reselect":             "#select",
		"HX-Trigger":              "evt",
		"HX-Trigger-After-Settle": "settle",
		"HX-Trigger-After-Swap":   "swap",
	} {
		if got := rec.Header().Get(header); got != want {
			t.Errorf("%s = %q, want %q", header, got, want)
		}
	}
}

// TestRequestReaders drives every HX* request-header reader and asserts the
// rendered value each one reads back.
func TestRequestReaders(t *testing.T) {
	mux := http.NewServeMux()
	TemplateRoutes(mux, nil)

	req := httptest.NewRequest(http.MethodGet, "/read", nil)
	req.Header.Set("HX-Boosted", "true")
	req.Header.Set("HX-Current-Url", "http://example.com/page")
	req.Header.Set("HX-History-Restore-Request", "true")
	req.Header.Set("HX-Prompt", "hello")
	req.Header.Set("HX-Request", "true")
	req.Header.Set("HX-Target", "#tgt")
	req.Header.Set("HX-Trigger-Name", "myname")
	req.Header.Set("HX-Trigger", "myid")
	rec := httptest.NewRecorder()
	mux.ServeHTTP(rec, req)

	if rec.Code != http.StatusOK {
		t.Fatalf("status = %d, want %d", rec.Code, http.StatusOK)
	}
	want := "boosted=true;current=http://example.com/page;restore=true;prompt=hello;request=true;target=#tgt;trigname=myname;trigid=myid"
	if body := strings.TrimSpace(rec.Body.String()); body != want {
		t.Errorf("body = %q, want %q", body, want)
	}
}
